description_long: This is a rugged, rectangular wooden storage box with a weathered olive-green finish, featuring visible wood grain and distressed paint. The top and sides are marked with white military-style stenciling, including a prominent star and the words 'MILITARY WEAPON.' The box is constructed from thick, horizontal wooden planks, fastened together with visible metal rivets at the corners. The surface shows signs of wear, with chipped paint and scuff marks, suggesting heavy use or outdoor exposure. There are no visible handles, locks, or hinges, and the box appears to be a solid, closed container. Its robust build and utilitarian markings indicate it is designed for secure storage, likely in military or industrial urban environments.
description: A weathered olive-green wooden storage box with military stenciling, constructed from thick planks and showing signs of heavy use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the stenciled star and 'MILITARY WEAPON' text, with visible wood grain and rivets.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the plank construction and the continuation of the stenciled markings across the top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back planks and the reverse side of the stenciled star, with more visible wear.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the plank ends and weathered paint.
